textByHashes.fb5045187d05515f48cf3af12d9651f4679562fe: Excellent. I will take them from here.
textByHashes.96b0f97dacfe4a49973764c281986dd733ba6913: I see you've wasted no time in introducing our new guest to the Theatre.
textByHashes.c371a99a7f9cfea0c730f5030045c42d88f41bc0: I must say, I find the name you've given her to be quite interesting. Not the kind of thing I'd have expected from you.
textByHashes.32d5ce60eaa621c554e9df6ab8b9c83a7e84f5dd: I see. So you intend to use her as a new challenge?
textByHashes.27f1fe1d25390953a17963f6fc0338838a456d5b: You should not have worried about that. The things we learnt from her down in the labs more than made up for the effort.
textByHashes.3eaf4782c72beec448e7abc70a59f027a86366a1: Well perhaps I have something that can help with that. I have a gift for you.
textByHashes.9af1688cc18e705e3def77453a96c14158d3c879: You can thank Lowerniel for this one. He found these eggs in an arachnid nest north of Darkmeyer. He thought you might be able to use them in your nylocas breeding program.
textByHashes.c3c669a3f483b54cb3198aea94c4bf940e13a941: The Theatre has never really been his thing.
textByHashes.c9e9db5c16d1c0b5f0928f3ab8a710dd28930e67: The arachnids there are highly unique. Lowerniel thinks their queen might be of a higher power.
textByHashes.738a3afd045f202a654f572fd706b80f29c57e1e: No, he suspects something more natural.
textByHashes.93701e22bef5449eebb11919a50fa262b36e6fea: I look forward to seeing the results.
textByHashes.ae35c5b7a75509832537034d59d38aae1cfa7411: Bloat? Not the most elaborate of names, is it?
textByHashes.975f3ee13563c868d1a664868d4e0a8af9f1266b: Well it's most definitely crude... Quite disgusting as well.
textByHashes.fde3f2686ee639d0f7e61b75ce518fa0b4bb2e9e: I just think it's important to take a bit of pride in your work. This is a Theatre, Verzik. We should be producing art!
textByHashes.1ff1b6a8c3a2d5477f76b64bc067048951c27e5f: It's quite a sight to behold.
textByHashes.292026b60f7f05309630685cd9a860d76f846bff: I'm glad you were able to make good use of them.
textByHashes.e59330e2bdad2510e5aba64707cee6513941415f: My my... You've really outdone yourself this time.
textByHashes.e16ccacabd283b1bf190ec835a564bf9f69b012f: So was this one also the result of those eggs?
textByHashes.7e16e262df9000b91f3ae1454a581c619ba7c8f4: Perhaps I can help. What are you missing?
textByHashes.95e438384141abd40d1f8f906d48349c81c22ce9: Hmm... I think I know just the thing. When we created the Maiden, we experimented heavily in that area.
textByHashes.00471abc24a2f1bedb4aa8560db2c96df8865581: Well in the end it wasn't actually haemalchemy that gave us the answer. It came in the form of a gift from the old queen.
textByHashes.6afad25ef5a36d3b87551aed199471208d7cc9d3: Precisely that! Specifically the hespori. Their bark has wonderful regenerative abilities.
textByHashes.eafc78ea70d6ecedae0241a9038ad72c85db7b30: That was the inspiration. Alas, the experiments didn't really go anywhere in the end.
textByHashes.f1c7e039b1de7350e8fd6ad0c276ed63cb2347d8: Speaking of experiments, did you think any more on my hespori suggestion for that new nylocas?
textByHashes.1fde7f1939af3ea2bee4821b39ea5c47f8655023: That's quite the ambition. So when do we get to see the results?
textByHashes.bdb766990c9bfa8ebfb61b6b48f607c26c0dfd57: It would seem so, but he did not enlighten me on how he did it.
textByHashes.2ac517585ecaa5d3da01af98b34c48f49ad740e6: ...and you believe this creature will be suitable?
textByHashes.3b2b42e631d7acb5ff0ef788001a4fb0046f4c80: We've given your vyrewatch more than enough opportunities and yet the Myreque still elude us. It's time for another strategy.
textByHashes.83a8d8a47c9c36b11d390b3e4389918a7f4c4aed: We'd still need the blood though.
textByHashes.c28d6cff34f72f807eac4ad0c8c37d3e0a03224a: Now is not the time for her games. We can't afford to let the enemy slip through our fingers again.
textByHashes.2428601f7a6f579bca5c64c2c28821c598c57e06: Anyway, you worry about the Myreque. I'll handle Vanescula.
textByHashes.ee8e7f26249d229e3be5596b72aa832a36961a97: Then I think we're done here. Thank you for your time Verzik.
textByHashes.78a7b56843ea21b22ff9b61db96f4828757f32a5: Citizens of Meiyerditch! I stand before you today so that we may share in a moment of triumph!
textByHashes.e0f46b176b38515a3908e54eb173bd21177f31a8: For years, the Myreque have lurked in the shadows of this city! Their acts of defiance tainting the greatness that we have all achieved together!
textByHashes.f9e0fca58230bb9de733cabcc6ac1fa8883d0d47: Today, that defiance finally came to an end! Today, we entered the home of the Myreque and eradicated their kind!
textByHashes.5d0e8a667939d1a28500cefd7ca4ca10bfa8d0a2: Our efforts today would not have been possible without every single one of you. The blood you provide ensures that we remain ever capable of facing these threats.
textByHashes.038d28c6a0899b3dedefec238b6b1f9eaa351e85: For that, you should all be proud.
textByHashes.caff20d518015fe748aeda7cfc68d4131e26e5db: However, while today is very much a day of celebration, it should also act as a reminder.
textByHashes.340ad6efdb3f1571407f5477fbcc8c9b0d3bf0b2: Rebellion. Resistance. Defiance. These are not the path to freedom. They are merely the path to death.
textByHashes.5588368352536e162f4a2fe180b5d21128078884: Anyone who wishes to be free of this life should instead look to Serafina.
textByHashes.dd32247b000b5a5471c8190c7291d9d3d8c4a00d: Follow in her footsteps. Enter the Theatre and survive. Do this and freedom will be yours.
textByHashes.8bcaecd22173495c2f8e101ef5db8c117ac3aa82: You know, over the course of my life, I have tasted more blood than you could ever imagine. The variety of flavours is incredible, and yet, there's one taste that all others pale in comparison to.
textByHashes.5f735b711cad461bd2d94012585bfc985f2f8cbf: You see, there's nothing sweeter than a taste of hope. And you're full of it.
textByHashes.5d470d679bf8025c9a8a8a92ef018f6c984d367b: I'm going to enjoy killing you.
textByHashes.f49c4bdde7eb58a8c3edc46b5053b1c83a4b9569: I take it you killed that abomination then? It was a human once you know. How does that feel?
textByHashes.b8ebc1701a885814adfd605e062fd5f07c651717: He was doomed. With his illness he'd have soon died with or without our tithing. We saved him, just like she wanted. All for you to just kill him!
textByHashes.9f8830326c59ccfcd3384f5f46e7140541693465: She was one of the smart ones. She was willing! Saving him was all that mattered. She was ready to sacrifice anything for that.
textByHashes.07923437fe003d1cec742c9b3b1b222697206163: It's a shame her mind is no longer there. One of the negatives of the process unfortunately. Otherwise I'd have introduced you. I'm sure she'd have loved to meet her brother's killer.
textByHashes.6a5f699bc60d879d793b62063efe93b6e0175401: Visciously efficient as ever, Vanstrom! You never fail to please us.
